description_long: This is a two-story stone house with a gable roof covered in textured shingles. The front facade features a covered porch supported by wooden columns, with two round tables and chairs arranged beneath it, suggesting an outdoor seating area. The upper story has two arched windows and a central wooden door, while the lower story also has a central wooden door flanked by stone walls. The side walls are constructed from large, irregularly shaped stones, giving the house a rustic, medieval appearance. The roof extends over both stories, providing shelter to the porch below. The overall design is symmetrical and robust, with a focus on stone and wood materials.
description: A two-story stone house with a gable roof, covered porch, and symmetrical facade featuring arched windows and wooden doors.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stone wall, gable roof, and partial view of the covered porch with outdoor seating.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a solid stone wall with no windows or doors, topped by the gable roof.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the stone wall, roof, and partial porch with seating.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the covered porch with tables and chairs, two arched windows, and central wooden doors on both stories.
attribute_entryway_design: Central wooden door on both stories, covered porch with wooden columns, outdoor seating, and no steps.
